name: Pumpkin Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, combine milk, sugar, eggs, salt, vanilla, and pumpkin; blend thoroughly.
2. Stir in bread cubes.
3. Pour mixture into a greased 1-1/2 quart baking dish.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes.
5. Mix brown sugar and cinnamon, then sprinkle over the pudding.
6. Return pudding to the oven and bake for about 10 more minutes.
Yield: 4-6 servings.
This was delicious served chilled with a dollop of whipped cream.
